# `/testfor` Command
Counts entities (players, mobs, items, etc.) matching specified conditions.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Game Directors</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>Yes</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/testfor <victim: target>`

## Arguments
- `victim`: target
